details: data.press_page_url: expected falsy, got "https://www.senzary.com/about/news" (Senzary has no real press/news page — /press/ was a Pressure Sensor product page)
data.press_page_type: expected falsy, got "about/news" (No press page exists)
data.article_count: expected lte 0, got 6 (Should be 0 or very low — no real press content)
checkpoint m16-press-page: expected info, got warning (No press page → info, not good/excellent)
checkpoint m16-rss-feed: expected info, got good (No RSS feed)
checkpoint m16-press-recency: expected info, got critical (No dateable content)
